# WZ-CONTRACT-DOCUMENTATION-001 — Winzard project documentation contract

Source: `docs/80-winzard/platform-contracts/WZ-CONTRACT-DOCUMENTATION-001.md`
Hash: `sha256:5cac8612bfb3cbb1dca821eab0fdc2c22c45d9a406c3f3316e2b88f3ef558eda`

## Contract

- The deployed project owns its product, domain, architecture, delivery and operations documentation.
- Canonical documents use Markdown, YAML frontmatter, stable project-prefixed IDs and Git history.
- Human and AI views are projections of the same canonical sources.
- Document, implementation and verification lifecycle states remain separate.
- Generated files under `docs/80-winzard` and `docs/90-generated` are read-only.
- Internal Winzard roadmap, tasks, handoffs, incidents and non-public ADRs must not be copied into a project.

## Constraints and prohibitions

- Do not use AI chat history, dashboards, Canvas files or generated indexes as the only source of truth.
- Do not include secrets, customer credentials or production payloads in documents or context packages.
- Do not edit generated consumer contracts or AI adapters directly.

## Acceptance criteria

- The project passes `forge docs:check`.
- Canonical IDs are unique and relationships resolve.
- Generated adapters and context packages match their source hashes.
